subcodes.title: Words to the Eastern pilgrims, spoken on 1913-06-30
subcodes.first_line: We must let loose the divine forces so that those souls who are standing still at the turnpike may move along the path of progress... We must ever strive to find out the subject which is of interest to the other party and speak with him from that standpoint.
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @spiritual transformation, @development of capacity and readiness, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @Manifestation of God as divine physician
